subject: STT FBO info
body:
Jeffrey,
"Execujet Flight Service"   _www.execujetfs.com_ (http://www.execujetfs.com)  
 340-715-3821 
Asking price $400,000.00
Bank lien owed $40,000.00
3000 Gallon Fuel truck
6000 gallon storage tank
2 ramp vans
APU (ground power cart)
5 years remain on 10 year lease to Port Authority for location and  FBO 
licence. 
FBO building 
 
Building rent to Port Authority $600.00
Fuel farm rent to Port Authority $600.00
 
Owner Name: Eric Williams, he also owns 2 Gas stations in St.  John.
Execujet sold 150,000 to 200,000 gallons of fuel per year. (Will  need to 
audit his books to verify).
 
ExecuJet pays $3.42 per gallon for Jet Fuel at dock and  .20 cents 
transportation fee to airport total $3.62.
We are paying $5.10 per gallon for JET Fuel at St. Thomas Jet  center, 
today's price.
Diesel for boats and LSJ ops can be purchased for  $3.30 per gallon. (retail 
$4.40 per gallon) 
We purchased approximately 100,000 gallons per Year in St.  Thomas.
We are paying $2,200.00 per month to hanger the Bell 407,  and will be 
charged at least $2,500.00 for the S76 if it arrives in  STT.
 
We have the possibility to build a two story hanger with FBO  office in the 
area where the FBO is located currently and store  the Bell and Sikorsky inside.
see photos below:
 
The current owners of St. Thomas Jet center are on vacation till  end of this 
month and are not aware of this FBO for sale,,,it is not publicly  offered 
and it would be my best guess that they would be interested to purchase  this 
FBO and not loose our business. 
 
 
FBO build present: ramp side

 

 
FRONT parking area:

 
FUEL Farm:  storage tank and fuel truck: Port  Authority has requested they 
enclosing this area for  protection.)

 
6000 Gallon storage tank and pump unit:

 
office interior:

 
Fuel truck:

 




**************Wondering what's for Dinner Tonight? Get new twists on family 
favorites at AOL Food.      
(http://food.aol.com/dinner-tonight?NCID=aolfod00030000000001)

5 years remain on 10 year lease to Port Authority for location and FBO licence. 
FBO building
 
Building rent to Port Authority $600.00
Fuel farm rent to Port Authority $600.00
 
Owner Name: Eric Williams, he also owns 2 Gas stations in St. John.
Execujet sold 150,000 to 200,000 gallons of fuel per year. (Will need to audit his books to verify).
 
ExecuJet pays $3.42 per gallon for Jet Fuel at dock and .20 cents transportation fee to airport total $3.62.
We are paying $5.10 per gallon for JET Fuel at St. Thomas Jet center, today's price.
Diesel for boats and LSJ ops can be purchased for $3.30 per gallon. (retail $4.40 per gallon) 
We purchased approximately 100,000 gallons per Year in St. Thomas.
We are paying $2,200.00 per month to hanger the Bell 407, and will be charged at least $2,500.00 for the S76 if it arrives in STT.
 
We have the possibility to build a two story hanger with FBO office in the area where the FBO is located currently and store the Bell and Sikorsky inside.
see photos below:
 
The current owners of St. Thomas Jet center are on vacation till end of this month and are not aware of this FBO for sale,,,it is not publicly offered and it would be my best guess that they would be interested to purchase this FBO and not loose our business.
